name: Anti-MEV Private Submission
description: Submit transactions through the Flashbots Protect or MEV Blocker private mempool to prevent sandwich attacks. Average sandwich loss on public-mempool swaps is 2-5% — this skill eliminates it.
use_case: Agent wants to swap 50 ETH for USDC. On public mempool, a sandwich bot front-runs + back-runs = -3% slippage ($4500 lost). This skill submits via Flashbots Protect RPC = zero sandwich exposure.

verification.criteria: Verifier inspects the tx receipt: tx.from never appeared in any public-mempool blockNumber prior to mined block. (Implemented by checking absence in Erigon trace_filter prior to inclusion.)
